special_mechanics.name: Cyberspace Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player moves weightlessly through wire-frame 3D environment in Cyberspace sections accessed via computer terminals

special_mechanics.name: Posture and View Controls
special_mechanics.description: Player can lean left/right, look up/down, crouch, and crawl for gameplay purposes including cover, item retrieval, and navigation

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and design philosophy but contains no quantitative physics parameters such as exact movement speeds, acceleration values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel system details. Game is first-person action-adventure with emphasis on exploration and emergent gameplay rather than precise platforming mechanics.
